name: motd-project
description: MOTD (Mukhawar of the Day) — UAE/GCC hybrid marketplace for ready-made clothes and custom tailoring

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.vercel-build: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
